summary: checkout@v4 lacks SHA pin; actionlint fetch omits checksum. TC1-TC6 workflow steps (lines ~57-105) duplicate identical 4-line pattern—a matrix job would halve the YAML. run-tests.sh line ~98 hardcodes 'ok 33 actionlint passes' name+count, breaking on any test refactor. Core pr-label-assigner.sh is clean.
